sources.title: SaaStr: Enterprise SaaS Contract Terms Guide
Cooley GO: SaaS Agreement Best Practices
Gartner: How to Negotiate SaaS Contracts

result.summary: Enterprise SaaS agreements increasingly include AI-specific data processing clauses, with the most negotiated terms being data ownership/portability, SLA commitments with financial credits, liability caps at 12-24 months of fees, and auto-renewal with 60-90 day notice periods.
key_findings: Data ownership clauses are the #1 most negotiated term in 2024, with 78% of enterprise buyers requiring explicit language that customer data is not used for model training
SLA standards have tightened: 99.9% uptime is table stakes, with top-tier enterprise contracts requiring 99.99% with escalating service credits (10% at 99.5%, 25% at 99.0%)
Auto-renewal terms are shifting from annual to quarterly opt-out windows in 34% of new enterprise agreements, reflecting buyer pushback against long lock-in periods
